description: Default blended flour properties used when no flours are present in the recipe. Represents a generic medium-strength Italian soft wheat flour (tipo 0/00).

wholeGrainThreshold.description: Flour is considered whole grain when fiber content exceeds 6%. Used by isWholeGrain() classification.

glutenFreeCondition.description: Flour is gluten-free when W === 0 AND fermentSpeed === 0.
